steps.title: Introduce the person
steps.content: The task is to introduce Clara Hayes to a new audience, so the choice must tell who she was. The notes identify her as a British violinist and former owner of a Stradivarius violin.

steps.title: Avoid Stradivari-only details
steps.content: Choice A is about surviving violins and does not name Hayes. Choice C says an instrument is named after Hayes but does not identify her. Choice D is about Antonio Stradivari, not Hayes. The answer is B.
